about_text:
Perfect Family Supermarket, operated by Perfect Family Trading Company, has been proudly serving the community since 1996.

Locally, we are widely known as Mini Supermarket, a trusted neighborhood store for everyday needs.

We offer a carefully selected range of daily essentials, including fresh vegetables, premium meat and fish, groceries, and kitchen essentials, all in one place.

With a strong focus on quality, variety, and convenience, we make everyday shopping simple and reliable.

Everything you need, in one place. A fresh choice for every home.
feat_delivery_desc: Fast and reliable delivery to your doorstep
feat_halal_desc: Trusted quality, meeting all halal standards
feat_parking_desc: Easy and hassle-free parking for all customers
feat_since_desc: Serving the local community for nearly two decades
feat_oneplace_desc: Groceries, fresh items, daily needs. All under one roof
feat_store_desc: Comfortable shopping experience with wide aisles
faq_0_a: We are located near King Saud Medical City in Riyadh.
faq_1_a: Yes, we provide free home delivery on eligible orders.
faq_2_a: Delivery usually takes 15–20 minutes depending on your location.
faq_3_q: What is the minimum order for delivery?
faq_3_a: The minimum order may vary depending on your location.
faq_4_q: What payment methods do you accept?
faq_4_a: We accept cash, debit/credit cards, Mada, and Apple Pay.
faq_5_a: Yes, we only provide 100% halal products.
faq_6_a: Yes, we accept returns for damaged or incorrect items.
faq_7_q: Can I cancel my order after placing it?
faq_7_a: Yes, cancellations are allowed before the order is dispatched.
faq_8_a: Our store is open daily from 8:00 AM to 11:00 PM.
faq_9_q: Do you provide offers or discounts?
faq_9_a: Yes, we offer deals and discounts regularly.
faq_10_q: What if an item is out of stock?
faq_10_a: We will notify you and suggest alternatives or issue a refund.
footer_text: © 2026 Perfect Family Trading Company. All rights reserved.
seo_meta_description: Perfect Family Supermarket in Riyadh, near King Saud Medical City. Halal groceries, fresh produce, home delivery, and daily essentials — serving the community since 2006.
seo_meta_keywords: supermarket Riyadh, Mini Supermarket, halal groceries, home delivery, King Saud Medical City, Perfect Family Trading, Saudi Arabia
